<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and facing right (`>`). The cell in front, row 02 column C, contains lava (`L`), which is deadly. To avoid moving into lava, I need to change direction. The safest path appears to be turning downwards (towards row 03 column B) where there is a safe floor (`.`). To face down from right, I will rotate clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and I am facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. If I move forward, I will enter cell 03 column B which is safe. From there, I can plan further moves towards the goal while avoiding lava at 02 column C and 03 column C.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. The cell directly in front (row 04 column B) is safe (floor), so I can move forward safely to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B and facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. The cell directly in front (row 05 column B) is a wall (`#`), so moving forward is not possible. I need to turn to face the right (`>`), which is currently to my right. To rotate from facing down to facing right, I need to turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B and facing left (`<`). The goal is at row 04 column D. To reach the goal, I need to move right, so I must turn around to face right (`>`). To do this from left (`<`), I can rotate 90 degrees clockwise twice or rotate 90 degrees counter-clockwise twice. I will start by turning clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 04 column B, facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. The direct path to the goal involves moving right (east). From my current orientation (up), I need to turn clockwise twice to face right (`>`), so I will start by turning clockwise once.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right (`>`) at cell row 04 column B. The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, two cells to the right. The next cell in front (row 04 column C) is a floor (`.`) and safe to move into. I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
